summary.shape_sentence: Early liquidation flush into a deep morning low, then persistent stair-step recovery into an afternoon trend-up close near highs.

goat.note: Opening liquidation flush was the highest-velocity standout move.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish signals were most effective during the opening flush; later downside attempts were absorbed into higher lows.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots improved after the 10:30 low and worked on pullbacks during the recovery trend.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27420-27460 initially slowed price but was broken; final upper supply near 27580-27620 capped the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Major demand held around 27175-27220; later support migrated higher to 27350-27380 and 27540-27560.

time_markers.10am_blue: Still in opening selloff/recovery volatility near 27230-27280, well below the open.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday rotation near 27380-27410; recovery intact but not yet in strong expansion.
time_markers.2pm_green: Upside breakout near 27560 after clearing lunch resistance.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bullish close near 27578, below HOD but near the upper end of the RTH range.

tags.banks_respected: early demand near 27175-27220; late higher demand near 27540-27560

takeaway: Bullish reversal-trend day after a violent opening liquidation. Early bear-trap flush into defended demand, followed by lunch consolidation and afternoon upside continuation.
